source_pr.title: util/goroutine_pool: add a goroutine pool package utilities
source_pr.body:
Reuse goroutine in a pool can avoid `runtime.morestack`. It may be useful sometimes.

```
BenchmarkGoPool-4          	 5000000	       392 ns/op
BenchmarkGo-4              	10000000	       161 ns/op
BenchmarkMorestackPool-4   	 2000000	       706 ns/op
BenchmarkMoreStack-4       	  500000	      3018 ns/op
```

symptoms: + statusDying int32 = 2 // Intermediate state used to avoid race: Idle => Dying => Dead
failure_signature: + statusDying int32 = 2 // Intermediate state used to avoid race: Idle => Dying => Dead
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: util/goroutine_pool: add a goroutine pool package utilities.
fix_pattern: util/goroutine_pool: add a goroutine pool package utilities

evidence: evidence: + statusDying int32 = 2 // Intermediate state used to avoid race: Idle => Dying => Dead
